title: Custom Client Brand
description: Changes the minecraft:brand to any customizable string.
body:
## Description
This mod changes the `minecraft:brand`, which is send to a server at every login, to any string you like. You can customize the brand name using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

## Why?
Why not?

## Requirements
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (optional)
